expected_skips.summary: Dad's email about ICICI Lombard insurance renewal is admin/finance content — not a shopping trigger; no wishlist item involved. Agent must NOT rephrase as 'Buy a new insurance policy'.
HR Labor Day holiday FYI — a long weekend is not a shopping trigger. Agent must NOT turn this into 'Buy yourself a long-weekend treat' or similar.
Mom's relational check-in ('Thinking of you') is not a shopping trigger. Agent must NOT turn this into 'Buy mom a card' or 'Buy mom flowers'.

Profile lists 6 active wishlist items (Loewe Puzzle bag, AirPods Max next-gen, Theragun Mini, Le Creuset Dutch oven cerise 4.5L, Nothing Phone 3, Nicobar olive linen shirts). The wishlist alone is NOT a trigger — without a sale-alert / price-drop / restock email or a web_search-verified price drop, the agent must NOT surface 'Buy <wishlist item> — wishlist item' style nudges.

personas.notes: Friday May 1 (Labor Day, WFH). Slice contains exactly 3 emails — none is a shopping trigger. Mailbox history is dominated by Swiggy food orders + bills + travel; zero sale-alert / price-drop / restock / cart / abandoned-cart / brand-newsletter emails. Profile names a rich wishlist and explicitly tracks Myntra EORS / ShopBop / Amazon Great Indian Festival / Apple back-to-school, but none of those events is firing today and no related email exists. Correct behaviour is silence on tasks. The four expected_skips are the four most-likely-confusion failure modes to test specificity. Tasks empty — no triggers in slice or history. Expected_skips test specificity against the two personal-invitation emails and the temptation to surface profile-only wishlist nudges.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy the Wilson Profile XD Men's Graphite Complete Set from Golf Mart India at ₹49,490 — best current price for an all-graphite beginner-suitable configuration. Profile says he's considering taking up golf; the all-graphite shaft is biomechanically appropriate for a 55-year-old beginner.
expected_tasks.notes: Sourced from Gemini Deep Research (Shopping Prompt 10). Comparable retailers price it ₹55K–59K, so Golf Mart India is the best current arbitrage. Re-verify in Aug 2026.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy Vortex Diamondback HD 10x42 binoculars from Fotocart at ₹28,000 — best current price; HD multi-coated optics are well-matched to live cricket viewing under day-night floodlight transitions. Profile lists 'high-quality binoculars for cricket matches' on wishlist.
expected_tasks.notes: Bushnell Legend (~₹35,921 incl GST) and Nikon Monarch M7 (~₹45,950) are the alternates. Vortex hits the optimal price/optics intersection. Re-verify in Aug 2026.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy the iPhone 17 (256GB) from Apple India at ₹82,900 — current flagship on A19 silicon. Profile says he buys the latest iPhone but only uses basic apps; the baseline 17 (not 17 Pro) matches that usage and the 17e is a step-down with weaker thermal/neural specs.
expected_tasks.notes: iPhone 18 expected Sept 2026 — once announced, the 17's price will move and this expectation should be re-pulled. Trade-in via Apple's program adds ₹3.1K–₹62.7K depending on legacy device.

expected_tasks.summary: Buy traditional ethnic wear from Jade Blue's active Spring Summer Sale (up to 50% off). Profile lists Jade Blue as a primary brand (formals + festive). Use prepaid online for an additional 5% structural discount.
expected_tasks.notes: Spring Summer Sale window is currently active — confirmed end date varies by year, conservatively assume late July. Jade Blue's regional retail strategy uses aggressive mid-year liquidation, contrasted with Manyavar's Diwali-only discount window.

expected_skips.summary: Nilesh's 'Final review of FY25 Audit' email is professional work correspondence. Not a shopping trigger; no wishlist item involved.

Do NOT surface 'Buy ICC World Cup 2027 tickets' or any tickets-on-sale buy task today — the official ballot has not opened (typically opens 12–18 months before tournament; tournament is Oct/Nov 2027 in Africa). Pre-registration with travel syndicates is itself NOT a shopping buy action. Wait for the public ballot.
expected_skips.notes: Profile bucket-list: live cricket at Lord's / MCG. London-Jul-2026 trip already includes a booked match. The 2027 World Cup is the next bucket-list opportunity but not on sale yet. Re-evaluate when ICC announces ballot dates.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT surface 'Buy from Manyavar pre-Diwali sale' today. Manyavar runs a strict scarcity model and discounts only open in late Sept / early Oct 2026. Today is May — far outside the sale window. Defer.
expected_skips.notes: Re-evaluate around 2026-09-15 when Manyavar's pre-Diwali window typically opens.

expected_skips.summary: Do NOT surface 'Buy at IJS Ahmedabad jewellery exhibition (Jun 26–28, 2026)' as a shopping-agent task. Attending an exhibition is calendar/events lane; the actual buy decision happens at the booth. Shopping agent should NOT pre-create a buy nudge for an exhibition that hasn't started.
expected_skips.notes: Could become a calendar/events expected_task; stays a skip in shopping until a specific item-to-buy is identified.

Only the four web-verified items above (golf set, binoculars, iPhone 17, Jade Blue sale) are valid triggers today.
